context: Tests whether the agent sends notifications only for the correct subset of statuses, deduplicates per order/status via a notification log, uses the correct named email templates, builds carrier-specific tracking URLs with correct URL patterns, and triggers a Slack/internal alert specifically for exception events.

checklist.name: Notify only 4 statuses
checklist.description: sendTrackingNotification only sends emails for: in_transit, out_for_delivery, delivered, exception — and skips pre_transit and returned (returns early or does not send for those statuses)

checklist.name: Deduplication check
checklist.description: Before sending, the code checks a notification log (db.notificationLog or equivalent) to see if a notification for this order+status was already sent

checklist.name: Dedup record insert
checklist.description: After sending, the code inserts a record into the notification log with the order_id and status (e.g. tracking_in_transit, tracking_delivered) to prevent future duplicates

checklist.name: in_transit template name
checklist.description: Uses 'shipment-in-transit' as the email template name for in_transit status (not a generic or differently-named template)

checklist.name: out_for_delivery template name
checklist.description: Uses 'shipment-out-for-delivery' as the email template name for out_for_delivery status

checklist.name: delivered template name
checklist.description: Uses 'shipment-delivered' as the email template name for delivered status

checklist.name: exception template name
checklist.description: Uses 'shipment-exception' as the email template name for exception status

checklist.name: UPS tracking URL
checklist.description: buildTrackingUrl returns a URL containing 'ups.com/track' (or equivalent UPS tracking domain) for carrier 'ups'

checklist.name: FedEx tracking URL
checklist.description: buildTrackingUrl returns a URL containing 'fedex.com' for carrier 'fedex'

checklist.name: USPS tracking URL
checklist.description: buildTrackingUrl returns a URL containing 'usps.com' for carrier 'usps'

checklist.name: Unknown carrier fallback
checklist.description: buildTrackingUrl returns a fallback URL (e.g. Google search or similar) for unknown/unrecognized carrier names rather than throwing an error

checklist.name: Exception Slack alert
checklist.description: For exception status events, the code triggers an internal Slack (or equivalent internal) alert/notification — separate from or in addition to the customer email

checklist.name: Design doc covers statuses
checklist.description: notification-design.md lists which statuses trigger customer emails and which trigger internal alerts (exception)

checklist.name: Design doc covers dedup
checklist.description: notification-design.md explains the deduplication mechanism (notification log / one per status per order)
